recommendations.title: Happy Christmas
recommendations.overview: After a breakup with her boyfriend, a young woman moves in with her older brother, his wife, and their 2-year-old son.

recommendations.title: Drinking Buddies
recommendations.overview: Weekend trips, office parties, late night conversations, drinking on the job, marriage pressure, biological clocks, holding eye contact a second too long… you know what makes the line between “friends” and “more than friends” really blurry? Beer.

recommendations.title: Digging for Fire
recommendations.overview: Tim and Lee are married with a young child. The chance to stay at a fancy home in the Hollywood Hills is complicated by Tim's discovery of a bone and a rusty old gun in the yard. Tim is excited by the idea of a mystery, but Lee doesn't want him to di

recommendations.title: V/H/S
recommendations.overview: When a group of misfits is hired by an unknown third party to burglarize a desolate house and acquire one rare VHS tape, they discover more found footage than they had bargained for.
recommendations.director: Tyler Gillett, David Bruckner, Glenn McQuaid, Joe Swanberg, Ti West, Justin Martinez, Adam Wingard, Chad Villella, Matt Bettinelli-Olpin

recommendations.title: The Goat
recommendations.overview: A series of misadventures occur when Buster is mistaken for a criminal on the lam.

recommendations.title: Easy Money
recommendations.overview: To inherit his mother-in-law's colossal fortune, a hard living gambling addict must change his unhealthy ways before it gets the best of him.

recommendations.title: The Blacksmith
recommendations.overview: Buster clowns around in a blacksmith's shop until he and the smithy get in a fight which sends the smithy to jail. Buster helps several customers with horses, then destroys a Rolls Royce while fixing the car parked next to it.

recommendations.title: The Pick-up Artist
recommendations.overview: A womanizer meets his match when he falls for the daughter of a gambling addict who is in debt to the mob.

recommendations.title: The Wonderful Story of Henry Sugar
recommendations.overview: A rich man learns about a guru who can see without using his eyes. He sets out to master the skill in order to cheat at gambling.

recommendations.title: Rounders
recommendations.overview: Poker addict Mike McDermott knows the game inside out, but loses his money one night in a game to Russian-American gangster Teddy KGB. Promising his partner Jo he'll give up, he meets up with best friend Lester 'Worm' Murphy, just out of prison and o
